name: tasq
description: Coordinate durable commitments across humans and AI agents through an explicit local Tasq space.

interface.longDescription: Inspect and coordinate durable commitments, claims, attempts, evidence and resource leases without replacing the agent runtime's private scratchpad.
defaultPrompt: Use Tasq to inspect the next durable commitments in my explicit space.
Use Tasq to claim and record progress on shared work.
